scripts.build: npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/server && npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/web && concurrently -k -n WEB,SERVER -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run lint -w @tesla-openclaw/server && npm run lint -w @tesla-openclaw/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run test -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run test -w @tesla-openclaw/server && npm run test -w @tesla-openclaw/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tesla-openclaw/shared && npm run typecheck -w @tesla-openclaw/server && npm run typecheck -w @tesla-openclaw/web
